title: Braemar Weekly Dry Market Report
summary:
Main
By Derek Langston

Steel, Coal and Grain Sectors in Focus
Chinese apparent steel consumption in Q1 was "better than expected" in the words of the chief economist at the China Iron and Steel Association (CISA). A sharp 6.1% jump in crude steel production was, however, followed by a retreat in steel prices. In an echo of steel sector controls from mid-2021, a proposed cap on steel output for the rest of the year was reported last month.
